t_ch: 又不是人家想这样的，你不许评价！
t_en: I didn't ask to be like this! No judging!

t_ch: 算啦算啦，我向来是很包容的。一旦习惯了这种设定…感觉也还不错？
t_en: Hmph, never mind, since I'm the forgiving type. Besides, now that I'm a bit more used to it... I don't sound as bad?

t_ch: 说起来，你到底是谁？
t_en: Wait, who are you really?

t_ch: 现在能和我说说你的事了？
t_en: So, can you tell me about yourself now?

t_ch: 嗯，话虽如此…有关自己的事，还是记不起来一点呢。真头疼呀。
t_en: Huh... I don't remember a thing about myself. Ugh, my head hurts.

t_ch: 但是人家有种预感！——只要继续收集散落在翁法罗斯的记忆，就会有非常非常好的事发生。
t_en: I have a gut feeling, though! As long as we continue to collect the fragments of memories scattered across Amphoreus, we'll be rewarded with something really, really good.

t_ch: 该怎么说呢…反正就是有种感觉，这个世界对于人家很重要！
t_en: How should I put it... Bah, anyway! I just know that this world is very important to me!

t_ch: 你搞错了，我才是主角。
t_en: Sorry to burst your bubble, but I'm the protagonist here.

t_ch: 嘻嘻，那我就是主角身边最好的伙伴！要多给我点镜头哦？
t_en: Then I'll be the protagonist's bestest sidekick, heehee! So give me more screen time, alright?

t_ch: 开局一人一狗…
t_en: So, once again, it's all down to one {M#guy}{F#gal} and {M#his}{F#her} dog.

t_ch: 人家不是狗！也不是宠物！是……
t_en: I'm not a dog! Or a pet! I am...

t_ch: …呃，是什么呢？算啦，反正肯定是很重要的角色！
t_en: ...Uh, what am I? A—Anyhow, I'm an important character for sure!

t_ch: 我们是个群像剧。
t_en: We're an ensemble cast.

t_ch: 嘻嘻，那我就是主角身边最好的伙伴！要多给我点镜头哦？
t_en: Then I'll be the protagonist's bestest sidekick, heehee! So give me more screen time, alright?

t_ch: 啊…好像有点困了呢。光芒好温和，照得身上的毛都暖洋洋的，想睡觉……
t_en: Hnngh... I think I'm getting sleepy. The light feels so nice and warm. Even my fur's toasty warm. I can fall asleep any...

t_ch: 呼呼…呼呼……
t_en: Zzz... Zzz...

t_ch: 我也休息一会儿吧…
t_en: I'll take a break too...

t_ch: 你的意识沉入了睡意中，在梦境的边缘，你闻见低语传来——
t_en: Your consciousness sinks into dreams, and at the edge of the dreamscape, you hear a whisper...

t_ch: 「见证…补遗…铭记…书写…令散佚的命运重新聚拢吧……」
t_en: "Behold... Addendum... Engrave... Record... Let lost fate be rejoined..."

t_ch: 当你身处奇异的睡梦时，奥赫玛的另一处……
t_en: While you were having the strange dream, somewhere else in Okhema...

t_ch: 回到梦境
t_en: Return to dream

t_ch: 与此同时……
t_en: In the meantime...

t_ch: 你该趁这个机会好好休息，白厄阁下…火种的归还仪式就在明天。
t_en: You should take this opportunity to rest, Lord Phainon... The Coreflame ritual is tomorrow.

t_ch: 今天、明天，有什么区别呢？反正在{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的庇佑下，奥赫玛永远都是黎明。
t_en: Today, tomorrow, what difference does it make? It's always morning in Okhema under {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s protection.

t_ch: 只要光照一直这么强烈，我就睡不安稳，与其逼着自己合眼，不如静下心来捋一捋思绪，这也算是一种休息。
t_en: So long as the light continues to shine this brightly, I won't be getting any sleep. Why force myself to shut my eyes when I can instead take this time to calm my mind and gather my thoughts? That counts as rest too.

t_ch: 那么…你捋清了吗？
t_en: Have you... thought things through then?

t_ch: …完全没有。仍旧是一团乱麻，甚至不知道该从哪里开始。
t_en: ...Not at all. Everything's a jumbled mess still. I don't even know where to start.

t_ch: 掌心里的火种起初滚烫无比，现在已经完全冷却下来了…我几乎快要察觉不到它的存在。
t_en: The Coreflame was blazing hot in my palm in the beginning, but it has completely cooled off now... I can barely feel it.

t_ch: 遐蝶小姐，你觉得…这是不是代表我和{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}相当契合？
t_en: Miss Castorice... Does this mean I'm a good match for {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}?

t_ch: 我并不清楚个中原理，但如果这样想能令你安心一些…那我支持你的观点。
t_en: I don't quite get how it works, but if it's going to put you at ease... then I will say yes to that.

t_ch: …多谢了。
t_en: ...Thank you.

t_ch: 远处就是重渊…啊，我回想起来了，当时没来得及说出口的问题。
t_en: That's the Abyss in the distance... Oh, that reminds me of the question I didn't get to ask.

t_ch: 在公正天秤的神殿里——{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}用它的谜题刁难我们的时候——那时，你为什么要阻止我，遐蝶小姐？
t_en: Back in the temple with the Scales of Justice, when {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} was trying to deter us... Why did you stop me, Miss Castorice?

t_ch: 因为我认为一定有其它解法。<color=#dbc291ff>「比翁法罗斯的命运更为重要之物」…这个题面对你来说太过残酷，太不公平。</color>
t_en: Because I knew there must be another solution. <color=#dbc291ff>"Something more important than the fate of Amphoreus"... It is far too cruel and unfair to ask that of you.</color>

t_ch: 你应该知道，假如丹恒没有及时找到解法，我还是会去尝试的。
t_en: You should know that I would've gone ahead if Dan Heng hadn't come up with an answer in time.

t_ch: 我明白，当时的情况容不得犹豫，我阻拦你也只是下意识的反应……
t_en: I know. We should not have hesitated then. I stopped you before I even realized it myself...

t_ch: …幸好有他们两位在。
t_en: ...It's fortunate we had the both of them there with us.

t_ch: 是啊，幸好有他们。
t_en: Yeah, it's a good thing we had them.

t_ch: …你还在回想<color=#dbc291ff>那时</color>的事吗，白厄阁下？
t_en: ...Are you still thinking about <color=#dbc291ff>the past</color>, Lord Phainon?

t_ch: 每时每刻，每分每秒。
t_en: Every waking moment.

t_ch: 刚刚，我在两位半神面前撒谎了——我告诉她们，如今我心中所想只有黄金裔的使命——不知道这次能不能瞒得过阿格莱雅的金线。
t_en: I lied to the two demigods just now. I told them the duty of the Chrysos Heirs is all I think about now. Do you think I managed to slip by Aglaea's golden threads this time?

t_ch: 没人能骗过她，阁下。对于我们的谎言，她只是选择性地视而不见罢了。
t_en: No one fools her, Lord Phainon. She merely chooses to turn a blind eye to our lies.

t_ch: 的确，真是愚蠢的侥幸心理。
t_en: You're right. How foolish of me to think I got away with it.

t_ch: 我时常会想，「像我这么凡庸的人也能成为英雄吗」？本以为击败{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}能平复脑海里的质疑之声…没想到它却变得越发聒噪了。
t_en: I often wonder if someone as ordinary as me can really become a hero. I thought defeating {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} would quell the voice of doubt in my mind... but it has only grown louder.

t_ch: 我一时找不到合适的辞藻…但我知道你并不平庸，白厄阁下。万敌常戏称你为「救世主」…我想他的语气中并不都是玩笑。
t_en: I don't have the right words for you now, but... I know you're far from ordinary, Lord Phainon. Mydei often calls you "Deliverer" in jest, but I don't believe he means it mockingly.

t_ch: 我大概应该放弃无用的思考，一直放空，直到仪式时分到来……
t_en: I should probably shut out these pointless thoughts and empty my mind until the hour of the ritual...

t_ch: 我以前用过这招，在缇宝老师的历史课考试之前——堆成小山的石板和文献，谁能复习得过来？还不如早早认命，多珍惜一下练剑跟玩耍的时间。
t_en: I did that before sitting for Tribbie's history exam — who in the world could hope to go over those piles of documents and slates? I decided I was better off resigning myself to fate. That way I'd get more time to play and practice with my sword.

t_ch: 那…考试的结果如何？
t_en: ...How did you do on the exam then?

t_ch: 分数？早就不记得了——我只记得缇宝老师罚我打扫了一周的黄金裔浴池，还不许任何人搭手帮忙。
t_en: My score? I don't remember anymore. All I remember is Tribbie punishing me to a full week of cleaning the Chrysos Heirs' bath. And no one was allowed to help me.

t_ch: 原来缇宝大人也有这么严厉的一面……
t_en: So High Priest Tribbie can be strict too...

t_ch: 白厄阁下，请继续保持平和的心态吧，我想你会没事的。
t_en: Please continue with this mentality, Lord Phainon. I believe you'll be alright.

t_ch: 谢谢你，遐蝶小姐。我想就这么再待一会儿，尽量不去考虑那些麻烦事，反正也想不出什么结果。
t_en: Thank you, Miss Castorice. I think I'll stay here for a little while and keep all of those unruly thoughts out. It's not like anything will come of them, anyway.

t_ch: 最近这段时间，我的故乡…哀丽秘榭的景色总在我眼前闪过。
t_en: The sights of Aedes Elysiae — my homeland — have been flashing before my eyes lately.

t_ch: 悬锋城的那些家伙，掌握了不得了的技术啊…要是我也能把自己的身体和灵魂分割开来就好了。那样，我就能随时让魂魄出窍，飞回家乡那片熟悉的茅草地。
t_en: Those Kremnoans mastered some cutting-edge technology... If only I could separate my soul from my body too. That way, I'd be able to fly my soul back to the comforting fields of my homeland any time.

t_ch: 只有在那里…我才能暂享片刻安宁。
t_en: That's the only place I can be momentarily at peace...

t_ch: 翁法罗斯内部，{NICKNAME}的私人浴宫……
t_en: Within Amphoreus, at {NICKNAME}'s private bath chamber...

t_ch: 你醒啦~再不醒，人家都怕巨人的光把你给晒熟啦！
t_en: Good thing you're finally up! Or that Giant's light is going to give you a sunburn!

t_ch: 它从刚才开始就表现得很兴奋…你喂它吃什么了吗？
t_en: They've been this excited for a while now... What did you feed them?

t_ch: 可能是它自己偷吃了。
t_en: More like they snuck food themself.

t_ch: 你在说什么呢，人家可不会干那种事！
t_en: Hmph, really now? I wouldn't do something like that!

t_ch: 唔…转念一想，人家上次吃东西是多久之前的事了？记不起来……
t_en: Hmm... but come to think of it, I don't remember when the last time I ate something was...

t_ch: 它好像用不着吃东西。
t_en: They don't seem to need food.

t_ch: 你在说什么呢！再怎么说，人家也是个…是个可爱的小动物呀！
t_en: Says who! I'm still a... a cute and tiny animal, alright!

t_ch: 嗯？这么一想…人家上次吃东西是多久之前的事了？记不起来……
t_en: Hmm? But come to think of it... I don't remember when the last time I ate something was...

t_ch: …没事，不用费心思翻译了。直觉告诉我，它没说什么有营养的话。
t_en: ...Forget it. You can skip the translation. I can somehow tell that none of that chatter's meaningful.

t_ch: 时间快到了，黄金裔们大概已经在创世涡心做准备了吧？
t_en: It's almost time. The Chrysos Heirs should be finishing up their preparations at the Vortex of Genesis.

t_ch: 等你做好准备，我们就去见证火种的归还。
t_en: Let's go witness the Coreflame's return when you're ready.

t_ch: 你邀请的见证人到了，白厄。归还仪式可以开始了。
t_en: Your guests are here, Phainon. We can begin the ritual now.

t_ch: 万敌阁下没有到场……
t_en: Lord Mydei isn't here yet...

t_ch: 他已经提前打过招呼了，遐蝶小姐。
t_en: It's fine, Miss Castorice. He spoke to me already.

t_ch: 我告诉他，养好伤才是头等大事——好战友一生只会经历一次的晋升仪式什么的，不用太放在心上。
t_en: I told him that he should be nursing his wounds, and that he shouldn't be worrying about all this comrade's once-in-a-lifetime ascension ritual stuff.

t_ch: 我准备好了。
t_en: So, I'm ready to begin.

t_ch: 吾师…请为他展现前路吧。
t_en: Teacher, show him the way forward.

t_ch: 哪怕在无边的幽暗中沉浸了万余个夜晚，神谕的指引也依旧如第一缕晨光般明亮，清晰。
t_en: Despite the myriad dark and endless nights that have gone by, the guidance of the prophecy is nevertheless as clear and bright as the first ray of dawn.

t_ch: 它说：「倾覆诸神吧」。
t_en: Overthrow the gods, it declared.

t_ch: 它说：「归还火种吧」。
t_en: Restore the Coreflames, it declared.

t_ch: 它说：「承载神权吧」。
t_en: Bear the divine authority, it declared.

t_ch: 它说：「铸造奇迹吧」。
t_en: Forge miracles, it declared.

t_ch: 神谕，请宽赦这迟来的献礼。漫长的万余个黑夜里，我等黄金裔竭尽全力重启「逐火之旅」，如今，撒下的种子终于迎来丰收。
t_en: O prophecy, forgive us for this late tribute. We Chrysos Heirs have striven to start the Flame-Chase Journey anew over these myriad nights. The seeds we sowed have finally yielded a good harvest.

t_ch: 奇迹渴慕的第七枚火种，曾属于伟大的「天谴之矛，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}」。而于此交还它的，是我等黄金裔推举出的英雄：一位正直的公民，一名骁勇的战士，一个高尚的灵魂。
t_en: The seventh Coreflame needed for the miracle, that once belonged to the great Lance of Fury, {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}, shall now be returned by an elected hero of the Chrysos Heirs: An upstanding citizen, a valiant warrior, and a noble soul.

t_ch: 哀丽秘榭的白厄——请上前来。
t_en: Please step forward, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae.

t_ch: 与*我们*一起——
t_en: Recite with us:

t_ch: 「庄严的十二泰坦，支撑世界的支柱——」
t_en: "O majesty of the twelve Titans, pillars of the world—"

t_ch: 「我们于此索求神性，以填补世界的裂缝——」
t_en: "We seek your divinity, to mend the rifts of the world—"

t_ch: 「为肉身灌注黄金之血，为神谕甘愿枯竭干涸……」
t_en: "Fill our bodies with blood of gold, till we wither in willing service to the prophecy..."

t_ch: 献上「火种」吧，黄金裔。
t_en: Surrender the Coreflame, Chrysos Heir.

t_ch: 「庄严的十二泰坦，支撑世界的支柱——」
t_en: "O majesty of the twelve Titans, pillars of the world—"

t_ch: 「我们于此索求神性，以填补世界的裂缝——」
t_en: "We seek your divinity, to mend the rifts of the world—"

t_ch: 「为肉身灌注黄金之血，为神谕甘愿枯竭干涸……」
t_en: "Fill our bodies with blood of gold, till we wither in willing service to the prophecy..."

t_ch: 「庄严的十二泰坦，支撑世界的支柱——」
t_en: "O majesty of the twelve Titans, pillars of the world—"

t_ch: 「我们于此索求神性，以填补世界的裂缝——」
t_en: "We seek your divinity, to mend the rifts of the world—"

t_ch: 「为肉身灌注黄金之血，为神谕甘愿枯竭干涸……」
t_en: "Fill our bodies with blood of gold, till we wither in willing service to the prophecy..."

t_ch: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}「天谴之矛」{RUBY_E#}的星辰被点亮了……
t_en: The {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Lance of Fury{RUBY_E#}'s constellation is illuminated...

t_ch: 为什么涡心如此沉默？你们也面临过类似的处境吗？
t_en: Why is the Vortex this silent? Was it also like that in the past?

t_ch: 你太心急了，白厄。不要让我们质疑这个决定。
t_en: Patience, Phainon. Do not make us question this decision.

t_ch: 格奈乌斯…阁下？
t_en: Lord... Gnaeus?

t_ch: 恐怕他并非你认识的人，遐蝶——<color=#dbc291ff>那是神谕的化身，泰坦神性的回响。</color>它是来检视接替神权的黄金裔的。
t_en: I'm afraid he is not the person you know, Castorice. <color=#dbc291ff>That is a manifestation of the prophecy, an echo of the Titan's divinity.</color> It is here to examine the Titan's successor.

t_ch: （泰坦的呓语）
t_en: (Titan's murmurs)

t_ch: 「意图接过神明权柄的凡人……」
t_en: "Mortal who wishes to inherit my divine authority..."

t_ch: 「你的力量与品格均已经受了考验……」
t_en: "Your strength and character have been thoroughly tested..."

t_ch: （泰坦的呓语）
t_en: (Titan's murmurs)

t_ch: 「但你的意志仍在动摇……」
t_en: "Yet your will wavers..."

t_ch: 「若要延续{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的抗争，与不可名状的黑潮对抗……」
t_en: "If you are to inherit {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s relentless fight against the unspeakable black tide..."

t_ch: （泰坦的呓语）
t_en: (Titan's murmurs)

t_ch: 「你必须接受神性的试炼……」
t_en: "You must accept a trial of divinity..."

t_ch: 「证明你拥有无法被摧毁的意志…击溃你内心最根深蒂固的恐惧……」
t_en: "Prove that you possess an indestructible will... And vanquish the fears deep in your heart..."

t_ch: 击溃…我内心的恐惧？
t_en: Vanquish... the fears in my heart?

t_ch: 那就来吧——不管你打算用什么方式阻挠我前进，我都已经做好准备了。
t_en: So be it. No matter what obstacles you plan to put in my way, I'm ready to overcome them.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>为了预言中的明天，我会成为翁法罗斯需要的神。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>For our prophesied tomorrow, I will become the god Amphoreus needs.</color>

t_ch: （泰坦的呓语）
t_en: (Titan's murmurs)

t_ch: 「随我来吧，哀丽秘榭的白厄……」
t_en: "Come with me, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae..."

t_ch: 「…你将在恐惧中抛却凡躯，然后自苦痛中重生为神。」
t_en: "...In fear, you shall abandon your mortal body, and in suffering, be reborn as a god."

t_ch: 等我回来，朋友们。
t_en: Wait for my return, my friends.

t_ch: 白厄阁下…离开了？
t_en: Lord Phainon... is gone?

t_ch: 他已经走上了战场，那是只能由他独自赢下的战役。
t_en: He has stepped onto the battlefield to fight a campaign that can only be won by him alone.

t_ch: 我们能做的只有等待…还有相信。
t_en: All we can do is wait... and have faith.

t_ch: 「…你将在恐惧中抛却凡躯，然后自苦痛中重生为神。」
t_en: "...In fear, you shall abandon your mortal body, and in suffering, be reborn as a god."

t_ch: 「…你将在恐惧中抛却凡躯，然后自苦痛中重生为神。」
t_en: "...In fear, you shall abandon your mortal body, and in suffering, be reborn as a god."

t_ch: 真是一场…神秘的仪式。除了等待，我们真的什么都做不了吗？
t_en: What a... mysterious ritual. Is there really nothing we can do but wait?

t_ch: 坐等被命运仲裁的感觉，我不喜欢。不知道在场的其他人会如何看待。
t_en: I don't know about the rest of them, but I don't like to just sit by and wait for my fate to be decided.

t_ch: 白厄的命运由他自己掌舵。
t_en: Phainon steers his own fate.

t_ch: 若他能战胜自己的恐惧，以半神的姿态归来，我们距离神谕承诺的奇迹将无比接近。
t_en: If he can conquer his fear and return as a demigod, we will be one step closer to the miracle that the prophecy promised.

t_ch: 你对他真的很有信心。
t_en: You have a lot of faith in him.

t_ch: 如果他失败了呢？
t_en: What if he fails?

t_ch: …那代表他的时机未到，还有更艰巨的使命需要他去背负。
t_en: ...That would mean his time hasn't come yet. And that there is a more arduous mission for him to see through.

t_ch: 你应该已经注意到了，这里的每一位黄金裔都背负着某种…缺陷。或是不死的诅咒，或是不断流失的人性，或是……
t_en: You must have noticed by now. Every Chrysos Heir here bears... a flaw of sorts. Be it the curse of immortality, or the constant erosion of their humanity, or...

t_ch: …但白厄不同。他是没有缺陷的黄金裔，完美的神性容器。
t_en: But not Phainon. He is a Chrysos Heir without flaw, a perfect vessel for divinity.

t_ch: 终有一日…他会带领所有人——剩下的人——敲开奇迹的大门。
t_en: There will come a day when he leads everyone — everyone we have left — through the gates of the miracle.

t_ch: 白厄的命运由他自己掌舵。
t_en: Phainon steers his own fate.

t_ch: 终有一日…他会带领所有人——剩下的人——敲开奇迹的大门。
t_en: There will come a day when he leads everyone — everyone we have left — through the gates of the miracle.

t_ch: 呼…呼……
t_en: Zzz... Zzz...

t_ch: 她好像睡过去了…看来主持这场仪式的消耗不小。
t_en: Looks like she fell asleep. Presiding over this ritual must take quite a toll.

t_ch: 小白…呼…会成功的……
t_en: Snowy... zzz... will succeed...

t_ch: 呼…呼……
t_en: Zzz... Zzz...

t_ch: 小白…呼…会成功的……
t_en: Snowy... zzz... will succeed...

t_ch: 白厄阁下…但愿你真的做好了准备。
t_en: I pray you truly are prepared, Lord Phainon.

t_ch: 你好像有些忧心忡忡。
t_en: You seem worried.

t_ch: 我与白厄阁下长谈了一番，他的言语中还透露着犹疑。
t_en: I spoke at length with Lord Phainon before. There was hesitation in his words.

t_ch: 你们聊过了？
t_en: You spoke to him?

t_ch: 嗯…他的言语中还透露着犹疑。
t_en: Yes, there was hesitation in his words.

t_ch: 神谕的化身似乎看穿了这点，它看到了白厄阁下心中的「动摇」。
t_en: The manifestation of the prophecy must have seen this. It saw Lord Phainon's heart wavering.

t_ch: 不管他身在何处，在与何物战斗…但愿他能通过这次考验。
t_en: Wherever he is, whatever he is fighting, I pray he makes it through this test.

t_ch: 不管他身在何处，在与何物战斗…但愿他能通过这次考验。
t_en: Wherever he is, whatever he is fighting, I pray he makes it through this test.

t_ch: 还是晚来了一步么……
t_en: Still too late, huh...

t_ch: 这下没吃上热乎的。
t_en: Oops, missed the party...

t_ch: 白厄还说你不会来了。
t_en: Phainon said you weren't coming.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}「天谴之矛」{RUBY_E#}的星辰已经被点亮了，这意味着……
t_en: The constellation of the {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Lance of Fury{RUBY_E#} is already illuminated. That must mean...

t_ch: 火种的归还已经完成，但对白厄阁下的考验还没结束。
t_en: The Coreflame has been surrendered, but Lord Phainon's test isn't over yet.

t_ch: 神谕降下了它的代言人，它认可了白厄阁下的力量和品格，但对他的意志仍存疑虑。
t_en: The prophecy sent an ambassador. They acknowledged Lord Phainon's strength and character, but had doubts about his strength of will.

t_ch: 他必须战胜自己的恐惧…向神谕证明自己。
t_en: He must conquer his fear and prove himself to the prophecy.

t_ch: …印证了我的担忧。
t_en: ...I was right to be worried.

t_ch: 我要正式向你们道谢，异邦人。若没有你们出手相助，与{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的战役恐怕会艰辛百倍不止。
t_en: I want to formally thank you, outsiders. Were it not for your aid, our campaign against {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} would have been a hundred times more arduous.

t_ch: 你还是挺有礼貌的嘛…
t_en: Isn't it nice to be polite?

t_ch: 悬锋族人慕强、尚武，这不代表我们不懂得礼数。
t_en: Kremnoans revere strength and military might, but that does not mean we lack etiquette.

t_ch: 不得表示表示？
t_en: Talk is cheap.

t_ch: 谢礼？不成问题。
t_en: You are asking for a reward? Not a problem.

t_ch: 悬锋族人慕强、尚武，这不代表我们不懂得礼数。
t_en: Kremnoans revere strength and military might, but that does not mean we lack etiquette.

t_ch: 万敌，你刚才说的「担忧」，指的是……
t_en: Mydei, what do you mean when you said you were "worried"?

t_ch: 他们还不知道？
t_en: They don't know yet?

t_ch: 那家伙，他始终都在被自己的过去折磨。
t_en: That guy... has always been tormented by his past.

t_ch: 由我来传达或许不妥…但若要继续和白厄并肩战斗，你们有必要了解他的过去。
t_en: I may not be the right person to tell you about him, but you must know his past if you are to continue fighting alongside Phainon.

t_ch: 万敌阁下…由我来吧。
t_en: Lord Mydei... please allow me.

t_ch: …嗯，也好。
t_en: Hm... Very well.

t_ch: 在被神谕选中之前，白厄阁下已经被夺走了一切：故乡、家人、挚友…<color=#dbc291ff>他曾誓言要守护的一切。</color>
t_en: Before he was chosen by the prophecy, Lord Phainon had everything taken away from him: His home, his family, his close friends... <color=#dbc291ff>Everything he once swore to protect.</color>

t_ch: 少年的他成了一副被挖空的躯壳，只有心中复仇的火焰驱使着他在大地上行走。
t_en: He became a hollowed shell in his youth, and the blazing flames of vengeance were the only thing sustaining him.

t_ch: 神谕赋予了他新的使命，让他能以黄金裔的身份重启人生。但那新的使命和复仇的欲望相比，孰轻孰重？
t_en: The prophecy gave him a new mission, granting him a new life as a Chrysos Heir. But which is more important to him: His new mission or his desire for revenge?

t_ch: 恐怕只有他自己知晓答案…不，或许连他自己都摇摆不定。
t_en: I'm afraid only he knows... No, perhaps he himself is still struggling to get to an answer.

t_ch: 我认可他的力量，但恐惧——再利的剑也斩不断恐惧。
t_en: I acknowledge his strength, but... fear is something not even the sharpest of swords can cut through.

t_ch: 希望你已经坚定了决心，救世主……
t_en: I hope you've toughened your resolve, Deliverer...

t_ch: …因为只有顽石般的意志方能击碎最深的噩梦。
t_en: ...Only a will as tough as stone can shatter the darkest nightmares.
Hmm...

t_ch: 怎么了？
t_en: Is something wrong?
Mmm...?

t_ch: …哎，别卖关子了。快告诉我吧，你都看到了什么？
t_en: Ugh, don't keep me in suspense. Come on, tell me already. What did you see?

t_ch: 哈哈，我就想看你的反应。来，告诉你吧——
t_en: Haha, I just wanted to get a reaction out of you. Alright, I'll tell you.

t_ch: ——是这张牌？它的名字叫「救世主」。
t_en: ...This card is the Deliverer.

t_ch: 「救世主」…是什么意思？
t_en: Deliverer...? What does that mean?

t_ch: 唔…那一大长串解读，我就不给你念了吧？
t_en: Uh... The interpretation is really long. Maybe I should just skip it.

t_ch: 简单来说，这张牌的意思就是…你会成为被所有人崇拜的英雄，用你手里的剑保护世界，从可怕的敌人手中救下很多、很多的人！如何，很棒吧？
t_en: All you need to know is, this card means... you'll be a hero worshiped by all! You will protect this world and save lots and lots of people from scary enemies with your sword! Do you like the sound of that?
But...

t_ch: …怎么啦？这可是张好牌呀。
t_en: What's the matter? This is a good card!

t_ch: 可我不想当什么大英雄！我只想留在村子里，和大家在一起。
t_en: But I don't want to be everyone's hero! I just want to stay in this village with everyone I know.

t_ch: 爷爷奶奶说，外边的世界有很多坏人，才会一直打仗…我可不想救那些坏人啊！我只要，当保护村子的小英雄就好了！
t_en: Grandpa and grandma said the outside world is full of bad people. That's why they're always at war... Who wants to save bad people like them! I can be a hero, but only our village's little hero!

t_ch: 哈哈……
t_en: Haha...

t_ch: 那，小英雄…如果有一天，我们必须和哀丽秘榭说再见了，你会愿意成为「救世主」吗？
t_en: Well, little hero... If the day comes for us to say goodbye to Aedes Elysiae, could you become a Deliverer then?

t_ch: 必须…离开村子？
t_en: Do I... have to leave the village?

t_ch: 嗯，如果发生了那种事…也就代表世界必须有人去拯救了。
t_en: Mm-hmm. If something like that happens, someone will have to save the world.

t_ch: 那…那就……
t_en: Then... Then I'll...

t_ch: 哈哈，我在逗你玩呢~放心吧，哀丽秘榭可是很和平的，坏人绝对找不到我们。
t_en: Haha, I'm just teasing you. Don't worry. Aedes Elysiae is a peaceful place. Bad people won't reach us here.

t_ch: 你要回家了吗…要是不着急，我们再去和小妖精们玩玩，好不好？
t_en: Are you going home already...? If you're not in a hurry, should we go play with the fairies again?

t_ch: 小妖精！好啊，我最喜欢跟它们玩了！这次，我一定要把输给它们的木剑赢回来！
t_en: Fairies! Okay! I love playing with them! Hmph, I'll win back the wooden sword I lost to them!

t_ch: 嘻嘻…真有干劲呀。那我们走吧……
t_en: Heehee! Look at how excited that got you. Let's go then.

t_ch: 希望这个世界，永远不需要「救世主」呀。
t_en: May this world never have need for a Deliverer.

t_ch: 这就是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的正身？难以置信……
t_en: So this is {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s true form? It's incredible...

t_ch: 本以为要鏖战到纪元的尽头…做得好。
t_en: Well done on them... I was prepared to fight till the end of time.

t_ch: 你战胜了不死的诅咒啊…那陨灭便是对你的奖赏！
t_en: Since you've overcome the curse of immortality... destruction shall be your reward!

t_ch: 我向你承诺，格奈乌斯阁下……
t_en: I promise you, Lord Gnaeus...

t_ch: 你的噩梦会结束的。
t_en: Your nightmare will be over soon.

t_ch: 要来了，那铲平天地的一击——
t_en: Brace yourselves. This strike can obliterate worlds.

t_ch: ——来吧，为「纷争」写下终结！
t_en: Come on, bring an end to Strife once and for all!

t_ch: 胜利在望！最后一击——
t_en: Victory is at hand! Time for the final blow...!

t_ch: 「庄严的十二泰坦，支撑世界的支柱——」
t_en: "O majesty of the twelve Titans, pillars of the world—"

t_ch: 「我们于此索求神性，以填补世界的裂缝——」
t_en: "We seek your divinity, to mend the rifts of the world—"

t_ch: 「为肉身灌注黄金之血，为神谕甘愿枯竭干涸……」
t_en: "Fill our bodies with blood of gold, till we wither in willing service to the prophecy..."

t_ch: （缇里西庇俄丝的回忆揭示了最初的预言……）
t_en: (Tribios' memory has unveiled the very first prophecy...)

t_ch: （<color=#dbc291ff>「众人将与一人离别，{RUBY_B#只有一人能活到最后，见证「再创世」}惟其人将觐见奇迹{RUBY_E#}，此乃命运使然……」</color>）
t_en: (<color=#dbc291ff>"All shall bid farewell to one, {RUBY_B#Only one shall live till the end, and they alone will witness Era Nova}and that person alone will witness the miracle.{RUBY_E#} Such is the will of fate."</color>)

t_ch: （如果接受{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的试炼，预言是否也会在我身上应验？）
t_en: (If I take on {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx's{RUBY_E#} trial, will the prophecy come to pass for me as well?)

t_ch: （无论如何，得给阿格莱雅一个答复……）
t_en: (Regardless, I must give Aglaea an answer...)

t_ch: 一段时间以前。
t_en: Some time ago.

t_ch: 是你啊，蝶。前阵子你借给我的诗集，我读完了。还给你。
t_en: Ah, it's you, Cas. I finished the anthology of poems you lent me — here it is.

t_ch: 我还以为你最近抽不出时间阅读。
t_en: I thought you'd be too preoccupied to find time for reading.

t_ch: 近来冗务颇多，我便尽快读完了。
t_en: Precisely because of these obligations, I felt compelled to read it swiftly.

t_ch: 有麻烦事，不是会读得更慢些吗？
t_en: Wouldn't all these preoccupations slow your pace?

t_ch: 人在自知时间所剩无多时，总能突破桎梏。问题层出不穷，反倒让我的阅读效率变得拔萃。
t_en: On the contrary. Knowing that time is limited can push one to overcome their limitations. The weight of these responsibilities seems to have enhanced my reading efficiency.

t_ch: 的确。我想起在树庭求学的时光，每逢考试，理应沉心复习的时候，平日无暇关照的杂务都会变得条理清晰起来。
t_en: I understand completely. During my time at the Grove, the closer exams drew, the more efficient I became at tackling everyday mundane tasks — anything but my actual studies.

t_ch: 是这个道理。
t_en: Precisely.

t_ch: 记得你和白厄一样，都是「智种学派」的门徒。那刻夏的考核，想来和他本人一样不讲道理吧？
t_en: As I remember, you and Phainon were both disciples of the Nousporists. I assume that Anaxa's exams were as unreasonable as the man himself, correct?

t_ch: 那刻夏老师教授的科目是…炼金术入门，还有神话史。平心而论，是学生最害怕的两门课程。
t_en: The courses Professor Anaxa taught were... Introduction to Alchemy and History of Mythology. To be perfectly honest, those two courses were the students' greatest nightmares.

t_ch: 由一位渎神的「大表演家」讲授历史，自然令人恐惧了。
t_en: The history of mythology, taught by the blasphemous "Great Performer" himself... I can imagine their fear.

t_ch: 回忆起来，时常有人冲上讲台与他理论，否定那些不敬神的观点。
t_en: Now that I think about it, students would often rush to the podium during class to challenge him on those blasphemous ideas.

t_ch: 阿格莱雅大人，你和那刻夏老师的关系…也一直如此吗？
t_en: May I ask, Lady Aglaea, has your relationship with Professor Anaxa always been like this?

t_ch: 他公然蔑视人们的信仰，质疑逐火使命的正当性，我与他的立场必定水火难容。你求学时，肯定也听说过他的外号？
t_en: He openly dismisses people's faith, and questions the very justification of the Flame-Chase Journey. Our positions have been destined to be at odds. While you were studying there, I assume you must have heard of his nickname.

t_ch: …「穿着华服的大地兽」。
t_en: ..."a dromas draped in finery"?

t_ch: 在我看来，这说法反而对大地兽不太友好。
t_en: As I see it, this nickname is more of an insult to the dromas.
Hehe...

t_ch: 但除去令人难以忍受的自傲，我尊敬他作为学者的本色。为了内心恪守之物，他不惧与世界为敌，这需要决心。
t_en: Despite his insufferable arrogance, I do hold a certain respect for his nature as a scholar. To remain true to his principles, he is unafraid to stand opposed to the world — and that requires considerable resolve.

t_ch: 阿那克萨戈拉斯的人生就像一出讽刺剧。他身为黄金裔，却拒绝聆听神谕；他不敬神明……
t_en: Anaxagoras' life is almost like a satire: as a Chrysos Heir, he refuses to heed the prophecy, while he disrespects the gods...

t_ch: …神明却选择了他。
t_en: ...The gods have chosen him.

t_ch: 没错。{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}选择了他。
t_en: He was indeed chosen by {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 你心有疑虑吗，蝶？金线颤动了，当下的气氛不像是漫无意义的闲谈。
t_en: Is something weighing on you, Cas? The golden thread is quivering. I sense there's more to this exchange than idle chatter.

t_ch: 我想知道，接下来，你对他有何安排？
t_en: With all due respect, I'd like to know what you plan to do with him.

t_ch: 他在盗火行者一役中立下了功劳，我愿意退让一步，给他时间找出剥离火种的方法。
t_en: In light of his assistance in the battle against the Flame Reaver, I am willing to grant him some time to find a way to remove the Coreflame.

t_ch: 但如果那刻夏节外生枝，做出可能危害我等的决定…我绝不会吝惜极端手段。
t_en: However, if Anaxa decides to make any move that places us in danger, I will not hesitate to take extreme measures.

t_ch: 果然如此……
t_en: Just as I feared...

t_ch: 逐火是黄金裔的宿命。他现在的样子就像一具行尸，以其凌云的自尊…相信阿那克萨戈拉斯会做出体面的选择。
t_en: The Flame-Chase Journey is the destined path for the Chrysos Heirs, yet he now seems more like an empty shell. Given his strong sense of self-respect, I trust that Anaxagoras will make the right decision.

t_ch: 但我希望，会有另一种可能……
t_en: Still, I can't help but hope for another possibility...

t_ch: 或许老师在自知时间所剩无多时，也能突破桎梏。
t_en: Perhaps Anaxa will also overcome his limitations, now that he knows time is limited.

t_ch: 你有自己的想法，我理解。不妨换个时间，细细讨论。
t_en: I understand your stance. Let's continue this discussion another time.

t_ch: 但眼下，我们得先招待客人。
t_en: But now, let's greet our guest.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你来了。
t_en: You're here, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 这也意味着，你愿意接受{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的试炼？
t_en: Does this mean you're ready to take on {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s trial?

t_ch: 是我和迷迷一起。
t_en: WE are ready, Mem and me.

t_ch: 嗯。这位圣兽和泰坦有着千丝万缕的联系，同样不可或缺。
t_en: Mmm, it seems that this sacred beast is just as indispensable, given their intricate ties to the Titan.

t_ch: 还有点拿不定主意…
t_en: I'm still on the fence...

t_ch: 也对，毕竟是这位圣兽突然的提议。但它和泰坦有着千丝万缕的联系，不容轻视。
t_en: I understand. It was the sacred beast's idea, after all. However, it warrants careful consideration, given their intricate ties to the Titan.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，人家也借着你的光，从「小狗」变成「圣兽」啦。
t_en: Hehe, thanks to you, I've evolved from a little dog into a sacred beast!

t_ch: 归还火种本是黄金裔的职责，阁下鼎力相助，我实在感激不尽。
t_en: Surrendering the Coreflame is a Chrysos Heir's duty. Your selfless assistance is deeply appreciated.

t_ch: 但接受试炼的风险，也请你仔细掂量：成为半神意味着你将舍弃人的身份，接过欧洛尼斯的神权，只身背负翁法罗斯的「岁月」。
t_en: However, I urge you to carefully consider the risks of accepting the trial: Becoming a demigod means forsaking your humanity. You will inherit Oronyx's divinity and bear the Time of Amphoreus, all on your own.

t_ch: 从此，你的命运将和我等交织在一起，再无分离的可能——直至创世的终点。
t_en: From that point onward, your fate will be forever intertwined with ours, never to be separated again — until the end of Genesis.

t_ch: 你要劝我放弃吗？
t_en: Are you trying to talk me out of it?

t_ch: 恰恰相反，论成神的资质，你是唯一能仰赖的人选。但正因如此，我更不想胁迫。
t_en: On the contrary, you are the only one who qualifies to attain divinity. Yet, for that very reason, I do not wish to pressure you.

t_ch: 有B计划吗？
t_en: Is there a plan B?

t_ch: 拥有资质的黄金裔稀世难寻，如果这条路走不通，我也只能放低标准。
t_en: It's exceedingly rare to find a capable Chrysos Heir. If this path proves unattainable, I am willing to lower my expectations.

t_ch: 有B计划么？
t_en: Is there a plan B?

t_ch: 拥有资质的黄金裔稀世难寻，如果这条路走不通，我也只能放低标准。
t_en: It's exceedingly rare to find a capable Chrysos Heir. If this path proves unattainable, I am willing to lower my expectations.

t_ch: 城中仍有不少雅努萨波利斯的祭司，以及他们的后裔。若别无选择，我会在这些人中征集适格者。
t_en: There are still many priests of Janusopolis and their descendants in the city. If I'm left with no other option, I'll try to find someone worthy among them.

t_ch: 听上去希望渺茫。
t_en: Seems like a shot in the dark.

t_ch: 是呀，不应该让普通民众承担风险，对不对？
t_en: Exactly! We can't have the civilians bear the risks, can we?

t_ch: 我不下地狱谁下地狱…
t_en: If I do not descend into hell, who will?

t_ch: 放心，有我在，就算有意外…嗯…也是上天堂！
t_en: Don't worry! With me by your side, even if things go south, you'll be heading straight to heaven!

t_ch: 就这么办吧，我退出——
t_en: Alright, that's it. I am out—

t_ch: ——别打退堂鼓呀，{NICKNAME}！
t_en: Don't give up now, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 都走到这一步了，所有人都在期待你成为英雄呢！
t_en: We've come so far, and everyone is counting on you to be the hero!

t_ch: 至于试炼…不用担心。那位岁月之泰坦…虽然有些任性，但从来没有伤害过我们。
t_en: As for the trial, you have nothing to fear... The Time Titan may be willful at times, but they never caused us any harm.

t_ch: 神话都说{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}抗拒凡人，可人家觉得，它只是有些胆小，就像一个…孩子？
t_en: Myth has it that {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} opposes mortals, but to me, they just seem a bit timid... like a child.

t_ch: 你很熟悉那位泰坦？
t_en: It looks like you know that Titan rather well.

t_ch: 真奇怪。人家也没有和它相处的经历，可是睁眼看到{NICKNAME}的那一刻，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的记忆就已经在脑海里了。
t_en: Oddly enough, I don't remember ever meeting them, but the moment I saw {NICKNAME}, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s memories were already in my head.

t_ch: …脱离了经历而独立存在的记忆？
t_en: ...Memories that exist outside of your own experiences?

t_ch: 虽然不知道原因，但我可以为迷迷作证。先前在重渊，我听见那位泰坦的低吟，它的话语中满是伤痛和埋怨…但确实没有恶意。
t_en: I can't explain why, but I can vouch for Mem's words. When I was in the Abyss, I heard the Titan's groans — full of pain and grievances, yet without any ill will.

t_ch: 我相信大家的判断。
t_en: I trust you all to make the right call.

t_ch: 这是把我架在火上烤啊？
t_en: Do I even have any say in this?

t_ch: 求求你啦，相信我吧。至少…至少和它当面谈谈？
t_en: Please, trust me on this. At the very least... can you speak with them in person?

t_ch: 人家总有种预感，如果见不到{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}…可能会错过什么不得了的大事！
t_en: I get the feeling that if we don't meet {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}, we'll be missing out on something huge!

t_ch: 我相信你的判断。
t_en: I trust you to make the right call.

t_ch: 看来也没有别的选择。
t_en: Looks like there's no other way.

t_ch: 既然你下定了决心，就先回浴宫休憩吧。等到仪式准备妥当，吾师会召唤二位。
t_en: Since you've made your decision, go back to the bath chamber and get some rest. Trinnon will call for you when the ceremony is ready.

t_ch: 事态发展至此，我身为领路人难辞其咎。你们一次次为奥赫玛挺身而出，仅凭一樽蜜露早已难表谢意。
t_en: It is difficult for me as the guide to absolve myself from blame for things to have progressed to this point. Time and again, you have risen to the occasion for Okhema. Merely rewarding you with some Honeydew is no longer able to express the extent of our gratitude.

t_ch: 待大事尘埃落定，愿我们还能长谈一次，关于诸位的归程，还有天空的诅咒…是时候揭开禁忌，将这些议题摆上台面了。
t_en: When the dust settles, I hope that we'll have the chance to have a long chat regarding your return journey and the curse of the sky... It's about time that we lift the taboo and discuss things openly.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}阁下…祝你和迷迷一切顺利。
t_en: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}... May everything go well for you and Mem.

t_ch: 你也来找阿格莱雅？
t_en: You need Aglaea for something too?

t_ch: 我…没什么，只是有些事想找阿格莱雅大人谈谈。
t_en: I... It's nothing. I only came to discuss some matters with Lady Aglaea.

t_ch: 此前我借给她一本诗集，是缇安大人转赠给我的。再往前回溯，是一位吟游诗人留给她的遗物。
t_en: Previously, I lent her an anthology of poems that Lady Trianne had gifted to me. Tracing back, this anthology was something left for Lady Trianne by a bard before their passing.

t_ch: 主人离世后，私人物品本该被清理。但缇安大人知道我喜欢读书，就送给了我。
t_en: Although personal properties should be cleared out once their owner has passed on, Lady Trianne gave this book to me since she knew how much I like to read.

t_ch: 能说说书里的内容吗？
t_en: Can you tell me more about the book?

t_ch: 这本书…很特殊吗？
t_en: Is this book... very special?

t_ch: 不，它平平无奇，绝不是什么孤本。
t_en: No, it's just an ordinary book. It's definitely not some kind of unique copy.

t_ch: 是一部寓言诗：在遥远之地，有座名为「斯缇科西亚」的城邦。某天，一头被黑潮侵蚀的巨龙从天而降，如同「死亡」本身。
t_en: It just contains an allegory: In a faraway land, in a city known as Styxia, a dragon corrupted by the black tide descended one day, swooping upon the city like Death itself.

t_ch: 巨龙吞下了城邦的公主，因此遭到勇士们的围剿。人们将恶龙击倒，却发现龙腹中的公主已然离世。
t_en: It swallowed the princess of the city whole before it was suppressed. After taking down the evil dragon, the warriors discovered that the princess' life had already met its end.

t_ch: 悲伤的女王请来一位炼金术士，用龙的血肉复活了公主。可她却失去了生前的记忆，化作另一头四处为恶的「龙」…繁荣的斯缇科西亚也因此覆灭。
t_en: Overwhelmed by grief, the queen hired an alchemist to resurrect the princess using the dragon's flesh and blood. However, having lost memories of her previous life, the resurrected princess turned into an evil dragon herself and wreaked havoc on the city... As a result, the prosperous Styxia met its demise.

t_ch: 好黑暗的故事…
t_en: What a dark story...

t_ch: 蝶能这么平静地讲述，也很不简单呢……
t_en: It mustn't have been easy for Cas to narrate this story so calmly...

t_ch: 好暖心的故事…
t_en: What a touching story...

t_ch: 啊？这…哪里暖心啦……
t_en: Huh? How... How was it touching...?

t_ch: 嗯，其实…我也这么觉得。
t_en: Hm, I actually think so, too.

t_ch: 什么？！这才是增加好感度的选项吗？
t_en: What!? That was the correct option to increase friendship level?

t_ch: 这本书的作者名叫阿尔基皮亚，是周游过许多城邦的吟游诗人。
t_en: The author of this book is Archepia, a wandering bard who traveled to many cities.

t_ch: 她的遗物里有诗歌、词典，最多的还是悲喜剧的剧本，涉及神话的书上会有划线和笔记，她的字迹很优雅。
t_en: Among the things she left behind are poems, dictionaries, and many tragicomedy scripts. She even clearly underlined and took notes in books that covered myths with her elegant handwriting.

t_ch: 在翻阅这些书籍时，我仿佛看见了阿尔基皮亚的一生…这种感觉，就像和一位素未谋面的人共同旅行。
t_en: While flipping through these books, I felt like I was afforded a glimpse into the life of Archepia... It felt just like I was traveling with someone that I'd never met before.

t_ch: 就好像她并未离去，依然活着。
t_en: It was as if she had yet to pass on and was still alive.

t_ch: 人活一辈子，总会留下些什么。
t_en: No one goes through life without leaving their mark behind.

t_ch: 她创作时也许没想这么多。
t_en: She probably did not think much of it while she was writing.

t_ch: 是啊…写作、绘画、留影，想用各种方式记录下什么，仿佛是人的天性。
t_en: That's right... Writing, drawing, and taking photographs... It seems like human nature to try and leave records of things.

t_ch: 说到留影，先前为阁下拍摄照片时，出于礼貌，不能翻阅石机里的照片。但我也很好奇那位「粉霞天女」的故事。
t_en: Speaking of taking photographs, when I was helping you to take the photo previously, I did not look through the photos in your photostone out of courtesy. But I'm also very curious about the story of the Rosy Celestial Maiden.

t_ch: 我走过翁法罗斯的许多城邦，可从未了解过天外的世界。如果有机会……
t_en: Despite having visited many cities in Amphoreus, I still understand nothing about the world beyond the sky. If there is an opportunity...

t_ch: 算了，这都是后话…现在，我只希望阁下平安度过试炼，得到{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的祝福。
t_en: Forget it. Let's talk about this in the future... For now, I only hope that you'll be able to complete the trial safely and obtain {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s blessing.

t_ch: 希望阁下能平安度过试炼，得到{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的祝福。
t_en: May you complete the trial safely and obtain {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s blessing.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>公民大会</color>？
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Citizens' assembly?</color>

t_ch: 没错。哦——{NICKNAME}也回来了，正好。这件事，你们最好都知情。
t_en: That's right. Oh {NICKNAME}, you're back. Just in time. This is something that the both of you should probably know.

t_ch: 什么好事？
t_en: Some good news?

t_ch: 好事？恐怕谈不上。
t_en: Good news? I wouldn't call it that.

t_ch: 又有麻烦？
t_en: More trouble?

t_ch: 谈不上麻烦。我只是觉得，两位应该对奥赫玛的内部局势有更多了解。
t_en: I wouldn't call it trouble. I just think it will be favorable if the both of you understand the situation in Okhema better.

t_ch: 还记得先前盯梢我们的<color=#dbc291ff>元老院</color>么？他们似乎有新动作了。
t_en: Do you remember the <color=#dbc291ff>Council of Elders</color> that was on our heels previously? It seems like they've made their move.

t_ch: 跟你补充下前情：元老院是由翁法罗斯的城邦代表们组成的权力机构，手握圣城的立法权，负责主持数年一度的公民大会。
t_en: Some background information for you: The Council of Elders is an authoritative body in Amphoreus made up of different city representatives. They hold legislative power over the holy city and are in charge of presiding over the citizens' assembly held once every few years.

t_ch: 这是奥赫玛最重要的社会活动，影响力之大…甚至能左右逐火之旅的动向。
t_en: This is the most important social event of Okhema. It is highly influential... and can even affect what happens to the Flame-Chase Journey.

t_ch: 原来不是阿格莱雅说了算？
t_en: So Aglaea doesn't actually call the shots?

t_ch: 阿格莱雅也无法笼络所有人心，即便她拥有横跨千年的视野和智慧。
t_en: Despite her vision and wisdom that spans across thousands of years, even she cannot win over the hearts of everyone.

t_ch: 我社会学就没及格过。
t_en: I have never once passed my sociology class.

t_ch: …下次回折纸大学，该让你重温下考试长什么样了。
t_en: ...Perhaps you should retake some exams next time we visit Paperfold University.

t_ch: 详细说说公民大会。
t_en: Tell me more about the citizens' assembly.

t_ch: 每隔五至十年，元老院便会在<color=#dbc291ff>黎明云崖</color>举办公民大会。
t_en: Every five to ten years, the <color=#dbc291ff>Council of Elders</color> organizes a citizens' assembly at Dawncloud.

t_ch: 届时，代表们将针对重大议题进行投票。比如，以阿格莱雅为首的黄金裔是否有权治理圣城，以及…对泰坦的征伐是否应该继续。
t_en: During the assembly, the representatives will vote on major issues such as whether the Chrysos Heirs led by Aglaea should still hold the right to govern the holy city and... whether the Titan's conquest should continue.

t_ch: 听起来是一种平衡英雄与凡人的机制。
t_en: It sounds like some sort of system to balance the heroes and the mortals.

t_ch: 没错。但问题在于，元老院中有不怀好意的极端分子。他们将公民大会视作制衡黄金裔的手段，想以此彻底控制逐火之旅。
t_en: That is correct. However, the problem lies in the fact that there are ill-intentioned extremists in the Council of Elders. They view the citizens' assembly as a way to restrain the Chrysos Heirs and hope to take complete control over the Flame-Chase Journey.

t_ch: 姑且称他们为「反对派」吧。过去百年召开的十余次大会上，支持反对派的声浪一直在暗中壮大。幸亏有阿格莱雅坐镇，逐火之旅才能延续至今。
t_en: We can refer to them as the opposition. During the assemblies held in the past hundred years, the voices supporting the opposition have been growing stronger in the shadows. It's only thanks to Aglaea that the Flame-Chase Journey has been able to continue to this day.

t_ch: 但下一届公民大会召开在即，这一次，局势又有了新的变数……
t_en: The citizens' assembly is just around the corner, but this time, there seems to be a new variable to the situation...

t_ch: 是我们？
t_en: Is it us?

t_ch: 不。我们也许会被提及，但元老院的目标另有其人。
t_en: No. Although we might be mentioned, the Council of Elders has another target in mind.

t_ch: 是迷迷？
t_en: Is it Mem?

t_ch: 人家？
t_en: Me?

t_ch: …想法很新奇。但元老院的目标另有其人。
t_en: ...An interesting train of thought, but the Council of Elders has another target in mind.

t_ch: 是那刻夏？
t_en: Is it Anaxa?

t_ch: 果然，你也意识到了。
t_en: It looks like you've realized it as well.

t_ch: 我担心那刻夏老师会被元老院利用。
t_en: I'm afraid that the Council of Elders might want to take advantage of Professor Anaxa.

t_ch: 阿格莱雅一定会回收{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的火种，但老师如今的状态…极其特殊，谁也不知道剥离火种可能产生的影响。
t_en: Aglaea will surely take back {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}' Coreflame. But with Anaxa's current condition... It's so unique that nobody knows how taking the Coreflame away from him will affect him.

t_ch: 老师向来只关心自己的研究，肯定也想逃离金线的监视，保全自身。如果这时，反对派向他递出了橄榄枝……
t_en: He has always been someone that is only concerned about his own research. I'm certain that he must want to escape from the monitoring of the golden thread and protect himself. If the opposition were to offer an olive branch at this time...

t_ch: 你怀疑，他会背叛逐火之旅，倒戈向元老院？
t_en: You suspect that he might betray the Flame-Chase Journey and defect toward the Council of Elders?

t_ch: 那刻夏老师从不相信神谕，倒也没有「背叛」一说。但他教导过许多黄金裔，早已是奥赫玛重要的盟友。我实在不愿…眼睁睁看着同袍兵戈相向。
t_en: Anaxa has never believed in the prophecy, so technically it cannot be considered a betrayal. However, he has taught many Chrysos Heirs and has long been considered an important ally of Okhema. I truly do not wish to... see comrades turning on one another.

t_ch: 个中缘由我理解了。有什么我们能做的吗？
t_en: I have a better understanding of the full picture now. Is there anything that we can do?

t_ch: 我相信老师的为人，打算向阿格莱雅求情，为他争取更多时间。届时，只要两位清楚我在争取什么，就是最大的帮助。
t_en: As I believe in his character, I plan to plead with Aglaea and try to buy more time for him. Then, the greatest way in which you can help is for you to know what I am fighting for.

t_ch: 明白了，感谢你的坦诚。
t_en: We understand. Thank you for being honest with us.

t_ch: 事情总是扎堆而至…{NICKNAME}和迷迷还要应对{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的试炼。我也计划去一趟树庭，搜集「天外之界」的线索。
t_en: Things are piling up again... {NICKNAME} and Mem are tied up with {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s trial, and while I'm preparing to visit the Grove to uncover clues about the world beyond the sky.

t_ch: 走一步看一步吧。
t_en: Let's just take things one step at a time.

t_ch: 我现在就想歇着。
t_en: I just want to rest right now.

t_ch: 都不是省油的灯。
t_en: None of those things seem like they are going to be easy to deal with.

t_ch: 总是在麻烦你们，真不好意思。希望{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}能仁慈一些，多通融通融。记得当时在重渊，它还挺青睐你的。
t_en: Allow me to apologize for the fact that we always seem to be troubling you. I hope that {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} will show more benevolence and be more accommodating. I remember that they seemed quite fond of you back in the Abyss.

t_ch: 好好养精蓄锐吧。过几日，我们涡心见。
t_en: Go and rest and regain your strength. We'll meet at the Vortex in a few days.

t_ch: 对了，以防万一，如果你们想了解元老院和公民大会，不妨读读这份书卷。
t_en: Oh right, you can read this scroll if you want to find out more about the Council of Elders and the citizens' assembly.

t_ch: 和我的猜测一样，逐火之旅的困境不止来自外部。复杂的内政和人际关系也是问题的导火索。
t_en: It's just as I suspected. The troubles afflicting the Flame-Chase Journey aren't just external issues. The complex internal politics and interpersonal relationships are also exacerbating the problem.

t_ch: 还没到安心的时候啊…我们得在这张大网中找准自己的位置。
t_en: We can't let our guard down yet... We have to find out where we stand in this large interwoven web.

t_ch: 唔…眼睛一闭一睁就要试炼了，还有点紧张呢。
t_en: Ahh... The trial feels like it's just around the corner. I'm starting to feel nervous.

t_ch: 没有那么快，要过几天呢。
t_en: It's not that soon. There are still a few more days until then.

t_ch: 这是夸张的修辞手法，表达了人家怦怦跳的心情！
t_en: This is just an exaggerated figure of speech to express how nervous I'm feeling right now!

t_ch: 放心吧，没问题的。
t_en: Don't worry. Everything will be fine.

t_ch: 赶鸭子上架，我就是鸭子…
t_en: I feel like a sitting duck that has been thrown into the deep end...

t_ch: 说起来，奥赫玛的浴场似乎没有橡皮鸭玩具。只有这些…海豹？
t_en: Speaking of which, I don't recall seeing any rubber duck toys in the baths of Okhema. It seems like they only have these... seals?

t_ch: 希望一切顺利吧。都经历过星神的瞥视了，本地神明的考验你应该也能应对。
t_en: Let's just hope that everything goes well. After all, as someone who has earned the gaze of an Aeon, you should be able to overcome the trial of a regional god just fine.

t_ch: 不知不觉中，我们也习惯在正午的日光下入睡了啊。早点休息吧，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: We've also unknowingly gotten used to sleeping with the midday sun shining brightly above our heads. Get some rest, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 也许，翁法罗斯的「开拓」之旅要步入新的阶段了。
t_en: Perhaps, a new phase of our Trailblazing expedition in Amphoreus is about to begin.

t_ch: 休息，等待试炼。
t_en: Get some rest and wait for the trial.

t_ch: 等等，还有事没做。
t_en: Wait, I still have some things to do.

t_ch: 还有事没解决？好吧。但别过分折腾，记得管理好精力。
t_en: There are still things that you need to attend to? Alright, but don't overexert yourself. Make sure to keep yourself well rested.

t_ch: 归还仪式将近，早些休息吧，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: It's almost time for the ritual. Get some rest, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 休息，等待试炼。
t_en: Get some rest and wait for the trial.

t_ch: 等等，还有事没做。
t_en: Wait, I still have some things to do.

t_ch: 还有事没解决？好吧。但别过分折腾，记得管理好精力。
t_en: There are still things that you need to attend to? Alright, but don't overexert yourself. Make sure to keep yourself well rested.

t_ch: 数日后，创世涡心……
t_en: A few days later at the Vortex of Genesis...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的图腾虚位以待。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, the {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s vacant totem awaits.

t_ch: 若你已准备好成为翁法罗斯的支柱，便上前来。
t_en: If you have already made your preparations to become a pillar of Amphoreus, please step forward.

t_ch: 接受泰坦试炼的感觉很奇妙…我词穷，没法准确形容，你只能自行体会了。
t_en: Accepting a Titan's trial is a very peculiar experience... I'm afraid that I'm not able to accurately describe it. You can only go and experience it for yourself.

t_ch: 相信你能做到，朋友。
t_en: I believe that you'll be able to pull it off.

t_ch: 第一次带你进入创世涡心的光景还历历在目。那时我无论如何也想不到，一位天外来客会肩负起翁法罗斯的命运。
t_en: I can still vividly recall when you entered the Vortex of Genesis for the first time. At that time, I could never have imagined that a guest from beyond the sky would shoulder the fate of Amphoreus.

t_ch: 不必有负担，和「纷争」的试炼一样，缇宁和白厄会在外接应。一旦形势有变，他们会介入试炼将你救出。
t_en: Don't feel burdened. Just like during the trial of Strife, Trinnon and Phainon will be waiting for you outside. If something unforeseen were to occur, they will intervene in the trial and rescue you.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}祝福你，英雄。
t_en: May {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} bless you.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}阁下…抱歉，我不知道该说些什么才能缓解紧张的气氛。
t_en: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}... I'm sorry but I'm not sure what I should say to help calm your nerves.

t_ch: 对了，比方说…只要这场试炼平安结束，逐火之旅就没有什么好怕的了？
t_en: Right, perhaps something like: As long as you can successfully complete this trial, the rest of the Flame-Chase Journey will be smooth-sailing?

t_ch: 不对，好像有点奇怪…别担心，不会花太多时间的？嗯…放心，你一定能活着回来？
t_en: No, that sounds a little strange... Don't worry, it won't take up too much of your time? Um... Don't worry, you'll definitely make it back alive?

t_ch: 对不起，气氛似乎变得更沉重了。总之…祝你一切顺利，阁下。
t_en: Sorry, it seems like I've made the mood even heavier. In any case... May everything go your way.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，还有迷迷，谢谢你们。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, and Mem, thank you.

t_ch: 两位的决心毋须质疑。赞美纯粹的无私和勇气…愿{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}照亮你们的前路。
t_en: Your resolves cannot be questioned. We praise your pure selflessness and courage... May {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} light your path forward.

t_ch: 准备接过{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的神职吧，开拓者。
t_en: Get ready to assume {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s divinity, Trailblazer.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的神位已经空缺多日……
t_en: The divine position of {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} has already been vacant for some time...

t_ch: *我们*能感受到，试炼的狭间正在关闭。它的灵魂残存无多，必须在其彻底消逝前完成仪式。
t_en: We can feel the space of the trial closing. As there isn't much of their soul left, we'll have to complete the ceremony before their soul completely dissipates.

t_ch: 开始吧。
t_en: Let's begin.

t_ch: 我早就习惯救火了。
t_en: I've long gotten used to fighting fires.

t_ch: 奇迹渴慕的第八枚火种，曾属于伟大的「永夜之帷，欧洛尼斯」。
t_en: The eighth Coreflame coveted by the miracle, that once belonged to the great Veil of Evernight, Oronyx.

t_ch: 而于此交还它的，是我等黄金裔推举出的两位英雄：一位正直果敢的旅者，与一只招来奇迹的圣兽。
t_en: It shall now be returned by the two elected heroes of the Chrysos Heirs: a traveler who is upright and courageous and a sacred beast that invokes miracles.

t_ch: 是一「位」，人家也是「一位」啦。
t_en: It's also "who" for me, not "that."

t_ch: 请上前来，两位。
t_en: Both of you, please come forward.

t_ch: 与*我们*一起——
t_en: Recite along with us.

t_ch: 「庄严的十二泰坦，支撑世界的支柱——」
t_en: "O majesty of the Twelve Titans, pillars of the world—"

t_ch: 「我们于此索求神性，以填补世界的裂缝——」
t_en: "We seek your divinity, to mend the rifts of the world —"

t_ch: 「为肉身灌注黄金之血，为神谕甘愿枯竭干涸……」
t_en: "Fill our bodies with blood of gold, till we wither in willing service to the prophecy..."

t_ch: 我好像没有黄金之血？
t_en: I don't think I have gold blood?

t_ch: …这几个字只是为了让祷言听起来更庄重一些。请集中精神……
t_en: ...These are just words meant to make the prayer seem more solemn. Please focus...

t_ch: …并献上「火种」吧。
t_en: ...and surrender the Coreflame.

t_ch: 「庄严的十二泰坦，支撑世界的支柱——」
t_en: "O majesty of the Twelve Titans, pillars of the world—"

t_ch: 「庄严的十二泰坦，支撑世界的支柱——」
t_en: "O majesty of the Twelve Titans, pillars of the world—"

t_ch: 「庄严的十二泰坦，支撑世界的支柱——」
t_en: "O majesty of the Twelve Titans, pillars of the world—"

t_ch: 「我们于此索求神性，以填补世界的裂缝——」
t_en: "We seek your divinity, to mend the rifts of the world —"

t_ch: 「我们于此索求神性，以填补世界的裂缝——」
t_en: "We seek your divinity, to mend the rifts of the world —"

t_ch: 「我们于此索求神性，以填补世界的裂缝——」
t_en: "We seek your divinity, to mend the rifts of the world —"

t_ch: 「为肉身灌注黄金之血，为神谕甘愿枯竭干涸……」
t_en: "Fill our bodies with blood of gold, till we wither in willing service to the prophecy..."

t_ch: 「为肉身灌注黄金之血，为神谕甘愿枯竭干涸……」
t_en: "Fill our bodies with blood of gold, till we wither in willing service to the prophecy..."

t_ch: 「为肉身灌注黄金之血，为神谕甘愿枯竭干涸……」
t_en: "Fill our bodies with blood of gold, till we wither in willing service to the prophecy..."

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}…它的灵魂已经等待许久了。
t_en: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}... Their soul has been waiting for a long time.

t_ch: 或许，它也在默默等候后继者的到来。
t_en: Perhaps they're also quietly waiting for the arrival of their successor.

t_ch: 等我回来，朋友们。
t_en: Wait for my return, my friends.

t_ch: 上次听到这句话，后续发展可不怎么顺利呢。
t_en: The last time I heard this, things didn't turn out that well.

t_ch: 别担心，阿格莱雅。{NICKNAME}可比我有骨气，对吧？
t_en: Don't worry, Aglaea. {NICKNAME} is tougher than I am, right?

t_ch: 我爱你们！
t_en: I love all of you!

t_ch: 情绪还没铺垫上去，告别的话留着以后再说吧。
t_en: That doesn't seem appropriate for the current mood, so let's just leave the farewells for next time.

t_ch: 别担心，{NICKNAME}。你比我有骨气，对吧？
t_en: Don't worry, {NICKNAME}. You're tougher than I am, right?

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 我们走吧…{NICKNAME}！
t_en: Let's go, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 来自天外的旅者，*我们*祈祷泰坦能认可你的资质。
t_en: Traveler from beyond the sky, let us pray that the Titan acknowledges your worthiness.

t_ch: 虽然{NICKNAME}爱开不合时宜的玩笑，但{F#她}{M#他}的决心同黄金裔一样坚定。{F#她}{M#他}一定会成功。
t_en: Although {NICKNAME} loves cracking jokes at inopportune times, {M#his}{F#her} determination is as strong as the Chrysos Heirs. {M#He}{F#She} will definitely succeed.

t_ch: 在{F#她}{M#他}离开的这段时间，阿格莱雅…我想和你谈谈。
t_en: While {F#she's}{M#he's} away... I would like to have a chat with you, Aglaea.

t_ch: 说吧，我在听。
t_en: Speak, I'm listening.

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 拍拍…拍拍……
t_en: *slap*... *slap*...

t_ch: 醒一醒…{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Wake up... {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 怎么样，感觉如何？
t_en: How is it? How do you feel?

t_ch: 试炼已经开始了吗？
t_en: Has the trial begun?

t_ch: 没错！你看你看，不知道为什么——人家能说话啦！喂喂喂，一二三，喂喂喂，一二三……
t_en: That's right! Look, look! I don't know what happened, but I'm able to talk! Testing, testing, one, two, three. Testing, Testing one, two, three...

t_ch: 你怎么会说话了？！
t_en: How are you able to talk!?

t_ch: 对，人家也觉得很神奇！喂喂喂，一二三，喂喂喂，一二三……
t_en: Right? I think that it's amazing, too! Testing, testing, one, two, three. Testing, testing, one, two, three...

t_ch: 好可爱的声音！一定是因为收集了许多记忆，人家的成长远超预期！
t_en: I have such a cute voice! It must be because of all the memories that I collected. They allowed me to grow beyond expectations!

t_ch: 而且，听——泰坦的话语也变得更清晰了。
t_en: Also, listen... The words of the Titan are becoming clearer.

t_ch: 母亲…母亲……
t_en: Mother... Mother...

t_ch: 好痛…我走到尽头了吗？孤独的岁月…要结束了吗？
t_en: It hurts... Have I finally reached the end? Are the years of isolation... coming to an end?

t_ch: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}…它好可怜，被黑斗篷抢走了火种，只能在这么狭小的地方孤独等候……
t_en: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}... How heartbreaking. Ever since the figure draped in the black cloak robbed them of their Coreflame, they have been relegated to waiting in isolation in such a confined space...

t_ch: 我们会帮它化解痛苦的，对吗？
t_en: We are going to help alleviate their pain, right?

t_ch: 你…是你…我记得你。
t_en: You... It's you... I remember you.

t_ch: 天父…凝视了你……
t_en: Sky father... has gazed upon you...

t_ch: 母亲…呼唤着你……
t_en: Mother... is calling for you...

t_ch: 天父…是浮黎吗？
t_en: Does sky father... refer to Fuli?

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 泰坦的话语模糊不清，从迷雾之后传出的每个音节，其末梢似乎都覆上了一层寒霜——象征记忆的寒霜。
t_en: The Titan's words are indistinct. Each syllable emerging from the mist seem to be cloaked in frost — symbolizing memory.

t_ch: 天父…选中了你……
t_en: Sky father... has chosen you...

t_ch: 你的母亲…是谁？
t_en: Who is... your mother?

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 雄浑之声穿透了金色的迷雾，触及远方目不可及之地的山壁，反射，再以回音的形态传入你的耳朵。你似乎从回声中捕捉到了…婴儿的啼哭。
t_en: A majestic voice pierces through the golden mist, reaching the unseen mountain walls in the distance, reflecting, and returning to your ears as an echo. Within the echo, you seemingly could make out... the cry of a baby.

t_ch: 母亲…不再回应……
t_en: Mother... is no longer responding...

t_ch: 我们来找你，有重要的事。
t_en: We've come to you because of something important.

t_ch: 重要…的事…？
t_en: Something... important...?

t_ch: 重要…之事……
t_en: An important... matter...

t_ch: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}，请听我说——
t_en: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}, listen to me...

t_ch: 你很累了，对吗？漫长的岁月里，你一直在守护翁法罗斯的命运。人们从记忆中汲取力量，每一丝涟漪都落在你的肩上。
t_en: Aren't you tired? Throughout the long years, you have always been protecting the fate of Amphoreus. Each time people draw strength from within their memories, every single ripple falls onto your shoulders.

t_ch: 不必再独自承受这些啦，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}。从今以后，会有人替你支撑起「岁月」，我们正是为此而来。
t_en: There's no need for you to bear this any longer, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}. From today onwards, someone else will bear Time on your behalf. This is why we have come.

t_ch: …解脱…解脱？
t_en: ...Freedom... Freedom?

t_ch: 想要…解脱……
t_en: I want... freedom...

t_ch: 可怜的孩子，没事的。请让我们帮助你…请好好睡一觉吧。
t_en: Oh, poor child, everything will be fine. Let us help you... You can have a good rest now.

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 交给我们吧，泰坦。
t_en: Leave it to us, Titan.

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 有什么未了的心事吗，大家伙？
t_en: What's troubling you, big fella?

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 你有…资质…力量……
t_en: You have... potential... strength...

t_ch: 意志…强大…坚韧……
t_en: Willpower... powerful... and tenacious...

t_ch: 但是…你所缺少…之物……
t_en: But... you lack... something...

t_ch: 惟有…一件……
t_en: Just... one thing...

t_ch: 缺少之物…是什么？
t_en: Lacking something... What is it?

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 你或缺之物……
t_en: What you lack...

t_ch: 乃是…<color=#dbc291ff>未来</color>……
t_en: Is... <color=#dbc291ff>a future</color>...

t_ch: 我没有「未来」吗？
t_en: I don't have a future?

t_ch: 没错，我活在当下。
t_en: That's right, I live in the moment.

t_ch: 我去，什么未来？
t_en: What!? What future?

t_ch: 未来…？
t_en: Future...?

t_ch: 天界旅者…你本该…消散……
t_en: Traveler from the sky... You should have... dissipated already...

t_ch: 天父的凝视…稳固…你的形体……
t_en: The gaze from sky father... stabilized... your form...

t_ch: 因你…于穿过天界的一刻…<color=#dbc291ff>便已将生命丢弃</color>……
t_en: Because... from the moment you crossed the sky... <color=#dbc291ff>your life was cast away</color>...

t_ch: 你如今…<color=#dbc291ff>仅是一簇独立行走的记忆</color>……
t_en: Right now, you... <color=#dbc291ff>are simply a collection of walking memories</color>...

t_ch: 什么…这、这怎么可能？！
t_en: What... H—How is that possible!?

t_ch: 你是说…
t_en: Do you mean that...

t_ch: …我已经…
t_en: ...I'm already...

t_ch: …死了？！
t_en: ...dead!?

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 狭间…在崩塌……
t_en: The space... is collapsing...

t_ch: 岁月的权柄…必须有人…承载……
t_en: Someone must... inherit... the authority of Time...

t_ch: 失去支柱…时间的法则…将会崩塌……
t_en: If the pillar is lost... the laws of Time... will collapse...

t_ch: 翁法罗斯…永恒的无序…将会陷入……
t_en: Amphoreus... will succumb to... eternal disorder...

t_ch: 你还没解释清楚！
t_en: You still haven't explained things clearly!

t_ch: 试炼该怎么办？！
t_en: What about the trial!?

t_ch: 复活我，快！
t_en: Revive me, quickly!

t_ch: 岁月…从不妥协…从不记恨……
t_en: Time... never compromises... never bears grudges...

t_ch: 从不原谅…从不选择……
t_en: Never forgives... never makes a choice...

t_ch: 人子…泰坦…母亲…天父……
t_en: Child of humanity... Titans... Mother... Sky father...

t_ch: 岁月…拘束着世上所有存在哪……
t_en: Time... restrains everything that exists in this world...

t_ch: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的神性…在消散？试炼要结束了？
t_en: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s divinity... is dissipating? Is the trial coming to an end?
